subcodes.first_line: O my God! This servant hath turned toward the Dayspring of Thy oneness, the dawning-place of Thy singular revelation, and the manifestation of Thy most potent Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی هذا عبد اقبل الی مطلع توحیدک و مهبط ایه تفریدک و مظهر اسمائک الموتره فی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @firmness in the Covenant
